events.label: assistant
events.text:
Assessed the caliper guide pin condition and wrote the compliance decision to `/app/answer.json`.

**Decision: fail** (risk: high) — Dry/seized guide pins prevent proper caliper float, which is a non-compliant, installed-defective condition under OEM lubrication requirements. This causes uneven pad wear, brake drag, overheating, and pulling, all safety-relevant issues that must be corrected (clean, inspect for damage, re-lubricate with OEM-spec high-temp grease, verify free movement) before the job can be closed out.
